name: ETH Value Reacceptance Exhaustion v1
thesis: ETH 4h is the cleaner similar-asset lane for testing mean reversion from exhaustion only when structure reaccepts prior value. The edge should come from exhaustion plus re-entry into balance, not from blindly fading momentum.
edge_mechanism: exhaustion mean reversion into value reacceptance
invalidation_condition: Abort if exhaustion-plus-reacceptance does not generate enough trades, if value re-entry fails to mean revert, or if the tape trends too cleanly for fading to survive costs.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Price stretches away from short-term value, exhausts, and becomes tradable only once it re-enters balance rather than continuing to trend.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: A mostly choppy brief should still reward structured fades into value more than raw breakout chasing, while the reacceptance rule avoids catching every knife.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 4h is a cleaner lane for value reacceptance than DOGE because intrabar noise is lower while stretch-and-return structure is still visible.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If ETH trends in clean directional legs, exhaustion stretches may persist and punish the fade even after reacceptance.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If reversion works but overextends less than expected, tighten profit-taking rather than adding more entry filters.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; stretch and value reacceptance are sequential
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed with moderate stretch thresholds rather than capitulation-only conditions

long: Low <= EMA_20 - 0.5 * ATR_14 OR Low <= LOWER_BOLLINGER_20_2
short: High >= EMA_20 + 0.5 * ATR_14 OR High >= UPPER_BOLLINGER_20_2

long: Final 20% exits on touch of EMA_20 + 0.35 * ATR_14 or 4 bars
short: Final 20% exits on touch of EMA_20 - 0.35 * ATR_14 or 4 bars
